name: Norwegian Heart-Shaped Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the sugar and eggs until well combined.
2. Alternately add flour and buttermilk to the mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
3. Stir in baking soda.
4. Gently fold in whipping cream and melted margarine until just incorporated.
5. Add cardamom and mix until combined.
6. Preheat a heart-shaped waffle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions. Do not grease the iron; if needed, lightly spray with non-stick cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared waffle iron and cook following the manufacturer's guidelines.
8. Serve warm waffles topped with berry jam.
Each waffle contains about: 267 calories; 108 mg sodium; 70 mg cholesterol; 7 grams fat; 45 grams carbohydrates; 6 grams protein; 0.09 gram fiber.
